name: GOLFTEC Brentwood
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training facility that combines expert coaching with advanced motion measurement technology to help golfers improve their game. They offer personalized golf lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions using data-driven methods including OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and guidance. The centers are designed for players of all skill levels, from beginners chasing the basics to experienced players looking to refine their technique and achieve better on-course results.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Expert PGA-certified coaches providing personalized improvement strategies
Comprehensive club fitting services that add an average of 21 yards off the tee
Practice memberships with access to training bays equipped with launch monitors and video feedback
A clear, proven system for structured improvement with personalized game plans

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for lessons and fittings. For club fitting sessions, they will provide a variety of club heads and shafts to find the perfect match for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks to the facility?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on bringing outside food or drinks, but it does mention a pro shop with a 10% discount on retail golf gear. Contact the specific location for details on food and beverage policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play a full 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulator session at GOLFTEC typically takes about 60 to 90 minutes, depending on the number of players and the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly or suitable for youth lessons?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers lessons and uses technology like video analysis and launch monitors that can help juniors see and understand their progress, making it suitable for youth golfers. Specific junior programs or age requirements should be confirmed with the location.
